title: BEM-902 BMC evaluator
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/pilot/canvas').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

blocks = ['customer_segments','value_proposition','channels','customer_relationships','revenue_streams','key_resources','key_activities','key_partnerships','cost_structure']
template = {
  'status':'template_ready',
  'note':'operator fills strategic pilot choices; system can validate completeness',
  'blocks':{b:{'required':True,'value':'','owner':'operator_or_director'} for b in blocks},
  'minimum_ready_rule':'all 9 blocks present; pilot can be synthetic until operator selects real target'
}
Path('governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_template.json').write_text(json.dumps(template, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

synthetic = json.loads(json.dumps(template, ensure_ascii=False))
for b in blocks:
    synthetic['blocks'][b]['value'] = 'synthetic_' + b + '_placeholder'
synthetic['status'] = 'synthetic_ready_for_validation'
Path('governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_synthetic_example.json').write_text(json.dumps(synthetic, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

def evaluate(doc):
    errors = []
    for b in blocks:
        if b not in doc.get('blocks', {}):
            errors.append('missing block ' + b)
        elif doc['blocks'][b].get('required') and not str(doc['blocks'][b].get('value','')).strip():
            errors.append('empty block ' + b)
    return errors
errors_template = []
for b in blocks:
    if b not in template['blocks']:
        errors_template.append('template missing ' + b)
errors_synthetic = evaluate(synthetic)
status = 'PASS' if not errors_template and not errors_synthetic else 'FAIL'
result = {'status':status,'template_errors':errors_template,'synthetic_errors':errors_synthetic,'blocks':blocks}
Path('governance/reports/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATION.json').write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-902 Business Model Canvas evaluator
import json
from pathlib import Path
blocks = ["customer_segments","value_proposition","channels","customer_relationships","revenue_streams","key_resources","key_activities","key_partnerships","cost_structure"]
def evaluate(path):
    doc = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    for block in blocks:
        if block not in doc.get("blocks", {}):
            errors.append("missing block " + block)
        elif doc["blocks"][block].get("required") and not str(doc["blocks"][block].get("value", "")).strip():
            errors.append("empty block " + block)
    return errors
errors = evaluate("governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_synthetic_example.json")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/evaluate_business_model_canvas.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-902 Business Model Canvas template and evaluator\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nTemplate: governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_template.json\n\nSynthetic example: governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_synthetic_example.json\n\nEvaluator: governance/tools/evaluate_business_model_canvas.py\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors_template + errors_synthetic) if (errors_template or errors_synthetic) else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATOR.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATOR_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-902 BMC evaluator proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors_template + errors_synthetic) if (errors_template or errors_synthetic) else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_template.json','governance/pilot/canvas/business_model_canvas_synthetic_example.json','governance/reports/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATION.json','governance/tools/evaluate_business_model_canvas.py','governance/reports/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATOR.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM902 BMC evaluator ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
